trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit. eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.

trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Lifestyle and environment > Sleep
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "Do you consider yourself to be?" If the participant activated the Help button they were shown the message:     If this varies a lot, answer this question in relation to the last 4 weeks.
